steps.title: Dashboard

workflows.name: debug-startup
workflows.title: Startup Debug Sweep
workflows.description: Launch the desktop shell in fixture mode and walk the highest-signal startup and diagnostics pages for quick issue triage.

steps.title: Dashboard
steps.notes: Confirm that the shell rendered, the fixture banner is visible, and the status bar started updating.

steps.title: Provider Health
steps.notes: Check provider-level status badges, connection health, and any immediately visible fault indicators.

steps.title: Diagnostics
steps.notes: Use the diagnostics surface to inspect errors, remediation affordances, and high-level health signals.

steps.title: Advance Fixture Scenario
steps.notes: Cycle fixture mode once so degraded-state visuals can be checked without touching production services.

steps.title: System Health
steps.notes: Verify that health cards and status chips react to a non-happy-path fixture scenario.

steps.title: Settings
steps.notes: Finish in Settings so configuration-related startup issues can be inspected quickly.

workflows.name: manual-overview
workflows.title: Platform Overview
workflows.description: A top-level walkthrough of the shell, workspace launcher, and the four major workstation shells.

steps.title: Dashboard
steps.notes: Start on the dashboard to review the shell status bar, fixture banner, and the first-launch landing experience.

steps.title: Workspaces
steps.notes: Use the Workspaces page as the jump-off point for the major trading workstation surfaces.

steps.title: Research Workspace
steps.notes: The Research workspace groups backtesting, Quant Script, and strategy review surfaces.

steps.title: Trading Workspace
steps.notes: The Trading workspace focuses on blotters, live positions, and trading risk controls.

steps.title: Data Operations Workspace
steps.notes: The Data Operations workspace centralizes providers, backfills, symbols, and storage operations.

steps.title: Governance Workspace
steps.notes: The Governance workspace collects ledger, operational controls, and oversight surfaces.

steps.title: Help
steps.notes: The Help page is the starting point when an operator needs setup guidance or troubleshooting references.

workflows.name: manual-data-operations
workflows.title: Data Operations Workflow
workflows.description: A practical walkthrough for operators who manage providers, symbols, storage, and backfills.

steps.title: Data Operations Workspace
steps.notes: Begin in the workspace shell to orient around the operator dashboard and the available data operations tools.

steps.title: Providers
steps.notes: Manage active providers, credentials, and connectivity from the Providers screen.

steps.title: Provider Health
steps.notes: Review feed health, current statuses, and degraded-state signals before changing collection behavior.

steps.title: Backfill
steps.notes: Use Backfill to queue or inspect historical data collection work.

steps.title: Data Sources
steps.notes: Use Data Sources to review provider routing, failover ordering, and feed configuration without leaving the data operations workflow.

steps.title: Storage
steps.notes: Use Storage to inspect retention, layout, and data organization settings.

steps.title: Data Quality
steps.notes: Finish with Data Quality so anomalies and remediation work can be reviewed in one pass.

workflows.name: manual-research-and-trading
workflows.title: Research and Trading Workflow
workflows.description: Walk through the core strategy research surfaces and the trading cockpit used to inspect positions and risk.

steps.title: Research Workspace
steps.notes: The Research workspace is the umbrella view for strategy discovery, analysis, and run review.

steps.title: Backtest
steps.notes: Use Backtest to configure a strategy replay and inspect summary metrics.

steps.title: Strategy Runs
steps.notes: Use Strategy Runs to browse completed runs and drill into the detail pages.

steps.title: Quant Script
steps.notes: Use Quant Script for exploratory scripting and ad hoc analysis.

steps.title: Trading Workspace
steps.notes: Switch to the Trading workspace to inspect live operations and active risk surfaces.

steps.title: Position Blotter
steps.notes: Use the Position Blotter to review positions, marks, and exposure.

steps.title: Run Risk
steps.notes: Finish on Run Risk to validate the controls and risk views that govern a strategy run.

workflows.name: manual-governance
workflows.title: Governance Workflow
workflows.description: Cover the oversight surfaces used for ledger review, fund accounts, notifications, and reference data governance.

steps.title: Governance Workspace
steps.notes: Start in Governance to orient around the oversight and operational control surfaces.

steps.title: Fund Ledger
steps.notes: Use Fund Ledger to inspect balances, journals, and cash flow views.

steps.title: Fund Accounts
steps.notes: Use Fund Accounts to review account-level positions and supporting fund metadata.

steps.title: Security Master
steps.notes: Use Security Master to review reference data coverage and investigate security-level issues.

steps.title: Notification Center
steps.notes: Use Notification Center to review surfaced alerts and follow-up work.

steps.title: Settings
steps.notes: Finish in Settings to review controls that affect the governance and operator experience.
